commands.review_summary:
The PR adds title-attribute tooltip text for the Web UI Reasoning and Thinking controls in the chat selector and sessions table.

PR surface: Source +9. Total +9 across 3 files.

Reproducibility: yes. for the patch defect: source inspection shows new English i18n keys without generated locale/metadata changes, and the UI i18n check compares generated outputs against the current English source.
commands.review_followup: - [P1] The PR needs contributor or maintainer follow-up for real browser proof plus a generated i18n sync; proof cannot be supplied by repair automation for the contributor's setup.

target.title: fix(ui): add tooltips clarifying Reasoning and Thinking controls
target.body: Closes #90445 ## Summary This PR adds tooltip (`title` attribute) explanations to the **Reasoning** and **Thinking** controls in both the chat model selector dropdown and the sessions table, addressing the UI naming collision described in #90445. ## What was confusing | Control | What users saw | What it actually does | |---------|---------------|---------------------| | **Thinking** (sessions table) / **Reasoning** (chat selector) | `off` / `low` / `medium` / `high` / `maximum` | `reasoning_effort` sent to the provider API; only effective when the model supports it | | **Reasoning** (sessions table) | `off` / `on` / `stream` | Controls how reasoning output is displayed or streamed in the chat | ## Changes - **`ui/src/ui/chat/session-controls.ts`**: Added `title` tooltip to the "Reasoning" section label in the combined model selector dropdown. - **`ui/src/ui/views/sessions.ts`**: Added `title` tooltips to both the `Thinking` and `Reasoning` column headers and their `<select>` elements in the sessions table. - **`ui/src/i18n/locales/en.ts`**: Added new i18n keys for the tooltip text (`thinkingTooltip`, `reasoningTooltip`, `thinkingLevelTooltip`, `reasoningDisplayTooltip`). ## Verification - Hovering over the "Thinking" column header or select in the sessions table now shows: > "Reasoning effort sent to the provider API; only effective when the model supports it." - Hovering over the "Reasoning" column header or select in the sessions table now shows: > "Controls how reasoning output is displayed or streamed in the chat." - Hovering over the "Reasoning" section label in the chat model dropdown now shows: > "Reasoning effort sent to the provider API; only effective when the model supports it." ## Notes - This is a minimal, no-logic-change UI improvement. - i18n strings are only added to `en.ts`; other locales will fall back to English via the existing i18n fallback mechanism.
target.author: xuzehan-icenter
